data.title: Moody's upgraded AB Artea bankas ratings and its outlook
data.description: AB Artea bankas received positive news on 21 April 2026 when Moody’s Ratings upgraded its long-term deposit rating from Baa1 to A3. The outlook was also improved from stable to positive. Additionally, Moody's revised the outlook on the bank's senior unsecured debt rating to positive while maintaining the Baa1 rating. This indicates a positive advancement for AB Artea bankas in the international financial market.

data.title: Holding(s) in Company
data.description: Endeavour Mining plc has recently disclosed that they have received notification from BlackRock, Inc regarding the latter's interests in the Company as of April 20, 2026. This notification is significant as BlackRock, Inc is a major player in the financial industry. The specifics of BlackRock, Inc's interests, such as the percentage of ownership or the number of shares held, have not been provided in the announcement. This development could potentially have implications for the future direction of Endeavour Mining plc, as the involvement of a prominent institution like BlackRock, Inc can influence market perceptions and investment decisions. Stay tuned for further updates on this situation.

data.title: Broadridge Launches Central Risk and Liquidity Optimization Solution to Unify Trade Execution, Liquidity and Risk Management
data.description: A cutting-edge front-office solution has been introduced, allowing companies to consolidate risk management, internalize client transactions, enhance liquidity utilization, and boost capital effectiveness. In a recent announcement on April 22, 2026, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), a prominent player in the financial technology sector, unveiled the new integrated system.

data.title: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz visits Phoenix Contact at the Hannover Messe
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz made an appearance at the Hannover Messe opening, meeting with Phoenix Contact executives. He was greeted by CEO Dirk Görlitzer and COO Ulrich Leidecker. Also present was the General Manager of the Brazilian subsidiary.

data.title: Noveria Energy Signs Grid Construction Agreement with TenneT Germany for Large-Scale Battery Energy Storage Project
data.description: In FREIBURG, Germany, Noveria Energy revealed the signing of a grid connection construction deal with TenneT Germany for a 250MW battery energy storage system (BESS) project set to connect in early 2028. The project, situated in Niedersachsen in northwest Germany, serves as a vital connection point for offshore wind energy from the North Sea to the grid. This agreement signifies a significant milestone for the Company in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: WATERTECH CHINA 2026 to Spotlight Two High-Impact Forums, Driving Early Pre-Registration from Global Water Professionals
data.description: Scheduled to take place from June 9-11, 2026 at the National Exhibition and Convention Center in Shanghai, WATERTECH CHINA 2026, hosted by Herui Group, will serve as a platform for the global water sector to focus on smarter, more eco-friendly, and efficient advancements. The event aims to bring together key stakeholders in the industry to discuss and showcase cutting-edge technologies and solutions.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: First-quarter results 2026
data.description: In Helsinki on April 22, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp released their Q1 and Q3 interim report, showcasing a return on equity of 15.4% and earnings per share of EUR 0.36. This quarter's return on equity was slightly lower than the previous year's 15.7%. The report was shared at 7:30 EET and highlighted the financial performance of the bank.

data.title: 39 companies, led by Nasdaq, seek EU's quick action on DLT rules to avoid falling behind the US in tokenized finance.
data.description: A coalition of 39 members, which includes Nasdaq, has called on the EU to expedite pilot changes related to Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT). The group has cautioned that Europe risks falling behind the US in the realm of tokenized finance if swift action is not taken.

data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: E China city leverages high-level opening-up to bolster high-quality growth
data.description: The 5th RCEP (Shandong) Import Expo commenced in Linyi City on Monday, attracting attendees from 48 nations, including a significant number of domestic and international buyers as well as exhibitors. Linyi City, known for Linyi Trade City, hosted the event, highlighting its role in promoting economic openness and trade relationships.

data.title: Bureau Veritas: A Steady Organic Revenue Growth in the First Quarter 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Bureau Veritas (Bourse:BVI) reported key figures, showing a revenue of EUR 1,547.0 million. This marked a 4.5% increase organically, though there was a 0.8% decrease year-on-year. The standout organic growth came from the Marine & Offshore sector at +11.2% and Buildings & Infrastructure at +7.3%. Meanwhile, Consumer Products Services saw a moderate growth at +4.3%, Certification at +2.3%, Agri-Food & Commodities at +2.1%, and Industry at +0.7%. The scope effect remained stable at (0.1)%, attributed to bolt-on acquisitions contributing +1.8%.

data.title: Accenture, Vodafone Procure & Connect and SAP Pilot Humanoid Robotics in Warehouse Operations
data.description: In HANNOVER, Germany, Accenture, Vodafone Procure & Connect, and SAP are collaborating on a pilot project to introduce humanoid robotics into warehouse settings. This innovative initiative aims to test the potential of using robots with human-like features in streamlining warehouse operations.
